---
title: "Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

data(mtcars)
mtcars$cyl <- as.factor(mtcars$cyl)
```

```{r}
head(mtcars)
```

```{r}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = cyl, y = mpg, fill = cyl)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Miles Per Gallon by Cylinder Count",
    x = "Cylinders",
    y = "Miles Per Gallon"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = hp, y = mpg, color = cyl)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Horsepower vs Miles Per Gallon",
    x = "Horsepower",
    y = "Miles Per Gallon",
    color = "Cylinders"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = hp, y = mpg, color = cyl)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Horsepower vs Miles Per Gallon",
    x = "Horsepower",
    y = "Miles Per Gallon",
    color = "Cylinders"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
mtcars %>%
  group_by(cyl) %>%
  summarise(avg_mpg = mean(mpg)) %>%
  knitr::kable(col.names = c("Cylinders", "Average MPG"))
```
---
